linting.notes: golangci-lint config disables errcheck (intentional - fmt.Fprintf to output writers is logging pattern). Linter validated successfully with 0 issues.

testing.mock_patterns: No mocking framework - uses Go standard testing with temp directories for file I/O tests
testing.notes: 7 packages with tests (gpu, networking, rdma, config, controller, jobrunner, runner). All tests pass including race detector. CI runs with -count=1 -race flags.

gating_checks.name: Verify go.mod tidy
gating_checks.command: go mod tidy && git diff --exit-code go.mod go.sum

ci.notes: Both ci.yaml and e2e.yaml are gating (trigger on pull_request to main). E2E tests expect check failures (no GPU/RDMA in CI) but validate no runtime errors and valid JSON output. Release workflow is push-only (not gating).

build.notes: Makefile provides convenience targets. Build produces single binary bin/rhaii-validator. Uses Go 1.25.0 (from go.mod). Container uses UBI9 base with go-toolset builder.

conventions.import_style: Go standard import grouping (stdlib, external, internal)
conventions.notes: Standard Go project layout: cmd/ for entrypoints, pkg/ for libraries, deploy/ for K8s manifests, test/ for integration tests.

test_commands.notes: All 7 packages pass (gpu, networking, rdma, config, controller, jobrunner, runner)

container_recipe.notes: Container must have internet access to download go modules. Race detector adds ~1s per package.

results.notes: Race detector tests passed (longer runtime ~1s per package)

results.command: go mod tidy && git diff --exit-code go.mod go.sum

validation.summary: All validation steps passed: deps OK, build OK (36MB binary), lint OK (0 issues), tests OK (7 packages, all pass), race detector OK, go.mod tidy OK
